rules.title: Publishing rules

items.one: Write a clear title that reflects the topic.
items.two: Choose the closest specialization or category.
items.three: Use respectful language and cite sources when needed.
items.four: Avoid sharing private student data in public posts.

rules.tip: Start with a clear question or idea so colleagues can help faster.

smartTip.title: Smart tip
smartTip.body: Use headings, lists, and short paragraphs to make your post easier to read and more engaging.
